channel.title: Cloud on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud on Archive 03

item.title: Why Amazon Wins as AI Model Wars Intensify
item.description: Anthropic’s massive compute infrastructure deal with AWS raises a bigger question: is Amazon ($AMZN) an AI model winner, or the toll collector behind the entire race? We look at AWS, Trainium, capex, valuation, and long-term investment risks through three perspectives.

item.title: Google ($GOOGL) is 'Historically Cheap'—Is It Time to Buy?
item.description: Google ($GOOGL) has entered a historically undervalued range. Kurumi’s optimism about its explosive growth potential in AI and Cloud clashes head-on with Mikael’s pessimism, who warns of massive antitrust legal risks. Is investing in Google now a wise choice?
